All the Stars in the Sky by Sarah Lyons Fleming
All The Stars In The Sky is not your typical love story that’s for sure, which should be pretty obvious
considering it’s a book about a zombie apocalypse. This is the final book in the Until The End Of The
World series, and it is a series that had me hooked as soon as I started reading it.
